meta.notes: Long-form per-(month, category) rows extracted from AMFI Monthly Reports. Categories: flexi-cap, multi-asset, sectoral-thematic, large-cap. Optional fields are OMITTED when not detected — never zeroed. Rows merged by (month, categorySlug); prior rows preserved when the current run doesn't re-extract them. categoryHitsThisRun=96, totalCategoryRows=96.
